sentences.target: On abat ce mur du salon.

translations.fr: On abat ce mur du salon.
translations.en: We’re taking down this living room wall.
translations.es: Estamos derribando esta pared del salón.
translations.it: Stiamo buttando giù questa parete del salotto.
translations.ko: 거실에 있는 이 벽을 허물고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在拆掉客厅里的这面墙。
translations.yue: 我哋而家拆緊客廳嘅呢幅牆。
translations.ru: Мы сносим эту стену в гостиной.
translations.pt: Estamos derrubando esta parede da sala de estar.
translations.he: אנחנו מפרקים את הקיר הזה בסלון.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang phá bức tường phòng khách này.
translations.ar: نحن نهدم هذا الجدار في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: We breken deze muur in de woonkamer af.
translations.uk: Ми зносимо цю стіну у вітальні.
translations.hu: Lebontjuk ezt a falat a nappaliban.
translations.hi: हम लिविंग रूम की इस दीवार को गिरा रहे हैं।
translations.el: Γκρεμίζουμε αυτόν τον τοίχο του σαλονιού.
translations.nb: Vi river denne veggen i stua.
translations.id: Kami merobohkan tembok ruang tamu ini.
translations.sv: Vi river den här väggen i vardagsrummet.
translations.cs: Bouráme tuto zeď v obývacím pokoji.
translations.da: Vi river denne væg i stuen.
translations.ja: リビングのこの壁を壊しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun commonly used for ‘we’; takes 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of ‘abattre’; main predicate meaning to knock/bring down.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying ‘mur’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘abat’.
Contraction ‘de + le’; preposition introducing the complement ‘du salon’ specifying which wall.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘du’.

sentences.target: On a du boulot à abattre.

translations.fr: On a du boulot à abattre.
translations.en: We’ve got work to get through.
translations.de: Wir haben eine Menge Arbeit zu erledigen.
translations.it: Abbiamo un bel po' di lavoro da sbrigare.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们有很多工作要完成。
translations.yue: 我哋有好多工作要搞掂。
translations.tr: Önümüzde halletmemiz gereken çok iş var.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi có nhiều việc phải xử lý.
translations.nl: We hebben nog veel werk voor de boeg.
translations.nb: Vi har mye arbeid foran oss.
translations.id: Kami punya banyak pekerjaan yang harus diselesaikan.
translations.sv: Vi har mycket arbete framför oss.
translations.da: Vi har en masse arbejde, der skal klares.
translations.ja: やるべき仕事がたくさんあります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun often meaning ‘we’; governs 3rd person singular verb form.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; lexical ‘to have’ (not auxiliary here).
Partitive/fused determiner (‘de + le’) introducing an indefinite quantity before ‘boulot’.
Common noun (informal) meaning ‘work, job’; direct object of ‘a’.
Preposition marking an infinitival complement (‘à abattre’) that modifies ‘boulot’.
Infinitive; here in the idiom ‘abattre du boulot’ meaning to get through/put in a lot of work.

translations.en: We’re laying down our cards now.
translations.es: Ahora ponemos nuestras cartas boca arriba.
translations.de: Jetzt legen wir unsere Karten auf den Tisch.
translations.yue: 而家我哋擺低啲牌喺枱面。
translations.pt: Agora colocamos as cartas na mesa.
translations.he: עכשיו אנחנו מניחים את הקלפים שלנו.
translations.vi: Bây giờ chúng tôi đặt bài xuống bàn.
translations.ar: نحن نضع أوراقنا على الطاولة الآن.
translations.nl: Nu leggen we onze kaarten op tafel.
translations.hi: अब हम अपने पत्ते मेज़ पर रख रहे हैं।
translations.el: Τώρα βάζουμε τα χαρτιά μας στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Nå legger vi kortene våre på bordet.
translations.id: Sekarang kami menaruh kartu kami di meja.
translations.sv: Nu lägger vi våra kort på bordet.
translations.da: Nu lægger vi vores kort på bordet.
translations.ja: 今、カードをテーブルに出します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun used colloquially for ‘we’; selects 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of ‘abattre’; here used in the idiom about revealing one’s cards.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural, agreeing in number with the noun ‘cartes’.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of ‘abat’ (idiom: ‘abattre ses cartes’ = to lay one’s cards on the table).
Adverb of time modifying the clause.

translations.en: They’re felling the tree in the garden.
translations.es: Están talando el árbol del jardín.
translations.de: Sie fällen den Baum im Garten.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在砍倒花园里的那棵树。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺花園度斬緊嗰棵樹。
translations.pt: Eles estão derrubando a árvore do jardim.
translations.vi: Họ đang đốn cây trong vườn.
translations.nl: Ze vellen de boom in de tuin.
translations.hi: वे बगीचे का पेड़ काट रहे हैं।
translations.ja: 彼らは庭の木を倒しています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun (‘they’), masculine or mixed; triggers plural verb agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural of ‘abattre’; here meaning to fell/cut down.
Noun with elided definite article (‘l’’ < ‘le’) before a vowel; direct object meaning ‘tree’.
Contraction ‘de + le’; preposition introducing the complement ‘du jardin’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘du’ specifying location/possession.

jp: On abat ce mur du salon.
On a du boulot à abattre.
fr: On abat ce mur du salon.
On a du boulot à abattre.
en: We’re taking down this living room wall.
We’ve got work to get through.
We’re laying down our cards now.
They’re felling the tree in the garden.
